steps.title: Set the depth equal to zero
steps.content:
The submersible reaches the surface when its depth below the ocean surface is $0$. Set $g(x)$ equal to $0$.
$$0=-\frac{1}{52}(x+17)(x-31)$$

steps.title: Use the factored form
steps.content:
The constant factor is not zero, so the product is zero only when one factor is zero.
$$x+17=0\text{ or }x-31=0$$
$$x=-17\text{ or }x=31$$

steps.title: Use the time restriction
steps.content: The problem states that $x>0$, so the negative value is not possible for the number of minutes after collecting the sample. The answer is 31.
